subject: GRB 070201: Correction to GCN 6094
body:
V. Pal'shin on behalf of the Konus-Wind team report:

The link on the IPN triangulation map was given incorrectly in GCN 6094.
The correct link was given in GCN 6088, that is
http://www.ioffe.rssi.ru/LEA/GRBs/GRB070201_T55390/

We thank David Williams for pointing out the error.
